title: olearia pannosa subsp. cardiophylla
intro: Olearia pannosa subsp. cardiophylla, also known as the heart-leaved daisy bush, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, calm the nervous system, and aid in the relief of coughs and colds. Olearia pannosa subsp. cardiophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy for various health concerns.
